title: Drones of NGU Azov take control of skies over Mariupol
description: Unmanned aerial vehicles operated by the 1st Corps of the National Guard of Ukraine Azov are taking control of the skies over the temporarily occupied city of Mariupol in the Donetsk region, currently patrolling roads up to 160 kilometers from the frontline.

title: Preimplantation Genetic Testing Research Report 2026 - Global Market Analysis, Competitive Landscape, Opportunities, and Forecasts, 2021-2025 & 2025-2031
description: The Global Preimplantation Genetic Testing Market presents key opportunities driven by rising awareness of genetic disease prevention, advanced genetic testing technologies, and increased infertility rates boosting demand for IVF and PGT. title: Momentum stocks just saw one of the biggest reversals in five years. What usually happens next.
description: There had been ample warnings that stocks with price momentum had shot up too quickly, and on Thursday gravity reasserted itself.

title: "I apologise on behalf of the state"
description: In the İBB trial, lawyer Çetinbaş stated that the prosecutors who drafted the indictment were ignorant of the legislation. Addressing the detained Keleş, İmamoğlu said, "I apologise to this young man on behalf of the state."

title: Fluor tasked for feasibility study work on world’s largest polyphalite deposit
description: NYSE-listed engineering, procurement, construction and maintenance services provider Fluor Corporation has been selected to undertake feasibility study activities for diversified miner Anglo American’s Woodsmith mining project, in England. Fluor will recognize the undisclosed contract value in the second quarter of 2026.

title: Bengaluru: Patient’s jewellery worth Rs 10 lakh stolen in private hospital, staffer arrested
description: A couple’s visit to a private clinic for surgery ended in tragedy after the gold and silver jewellery worth around Rs 9.7 lakh was stolen from a private hospital on May 1. After a complaint was filed at Hennur police station, a hospital staffer was arrested. Police is trying to recover the stolen ornaments.
